PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicole Diamond appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mrs. Diamond stated that the pleading was filed stamped May 3, 2024, that they made a $2,000.00 error in item 3d, that the correct amount is $2,002,000.00 and that she has not heard of any objections. The court granted the Second Amended Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated January 20, 2005, is admitted to probate. Tracey Glieberman is appointed as Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance will be required on that date. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.
